data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Post-experience photo sharing', but the evidence does not include any concrete API reads or checks that confirm this functionality. While the linked use case mentions that 'Photos shared to group album post-tour', it lacks specific evidence of how this feature is implemented or validated through API interactions. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence needed to satisfy this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of API interactions or checks confirming the functionality of post-experience photo sharing.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add API validation for photo sharing
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the post-experience photo sharing functionality.
